pi_items.source: Code inspection: verifier.py line 67 comments 'Nx Witness API uses cameraDisconnectEvent' and line 69 checks for this event type. Task description line 5 specifies 'Event: Camera Disconnect (cameraDisconnectEvent)'. setup_task.sh cleans up rules with this comment pattern.

Code inspection: verifier.py line 76 comments 'Nx Witness API uses showPopupAction' and line 78 checks for this action type. Task description line 5 specifies 'Action: Show Desktop Notification (showPopupAction)'. Web search result mentions 'all alert notifications are passed with the showPopupAction'.

Code inspection: verifier.py line 30 uses this as default expected_comment. Line 86 performs exact match comparison. Task description line 5 specifies exact spelling/casing. setup_task.sh line 22 searches for rules with this comment.

Code inspection: setup_task.sh line 14 calls nx_api_get '/rest/v1/rules'. export_result.sh line 14 calls nx_api_get '/rest/v1/rules'. Task description recommends 'REST API (POST /rest/v1/rules)'. task_utils.sh defines NX_BASE as 'https://localhost:7001'.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates an event rule in Nx Witness VMS using eventType 'cameraDisconnectEvent' with actionType 'showPopupAction'. The rule must have comment 'Camera Offline Alert', apply to all cameras (empty eventResourceIds), be enabled, and is created via the REST API at https://localhost:7001/rest/v1/rules endpoint.
